examples: Do you know what is a stalagmite?
A stalagmite. The cave is full of them.
There a highest stalagmite in the world - — Dinghu Peak.
In December 2013, Dutch wakeboarder and Red Bull-sponsored athlete Duncan Zuur had the rare opportunity to wakeboard through the warm waters of the stalactite- and stalagmite-filled Jeita Grotto.
